Bash(node -e "const https = require\(''https''\); const fs = require\(''fs''\); https.get\(''https://img.youtube.com/vi/ocRpawewx9M/maxresdefault.jpg'', \(res\) => { const file = fs.createWriteStream\(''public/img-hero/hero-poster.jpg''\); res.pipe\(file\); file.on\(''finish'', \(\) => { file.close\(\); console.log\(''Downloaded'', fs.statSync\(''public/img-hero/hero-poster.jpg''\).size, ''bytes''\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\(''sharp''\); sharp\(''public/img-hero/hero-poster.jpg''\).webp\({ quality: 60 }\).toFile\(''public/img-hero/hero-poster.webp''\).then\(info => console.log\(''Converted:'', info.size, ''bytes''\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);")
